title: write_smt2: bugs caused by a corner case in constant propagation
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.29+11 (git sha1 d82bae32b, clang 10.0.0-4ubuntu1 -fPIC -Os)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

Verilog file:
```verilog
module top (z, clk);
  input clk;
  output reg [7:0] z = 0;

  wire signed [2:0] a;
  assign a = 8'hff;

  always @(posedge clk) begin
    z <= a;
  end
endmodule
```

Yosys script:
```
read_verilog -formal top.v; hierarchy -check -top top
proc; opt; memory -nordff -nomap; opt -fast
dffunmap; write_smt2 -wires"
```

### Expected Behavior

The initial value of `z`: `8'b0`.

Then the value of `z` will be changed into and stay at `8'b111`.

### Actual Behavior

Output of Yosys:
```
; SMT-LIBv2 description generated by Yosys 0.29+11 (git sha1 d82bae32b, clang 10.0.0-4ubuntu1 -fPIC -Os)
; yosys-smt2-module top
(declare-sort |top_s| 0)
(declare-fun |top_is| (|top_s|) Bool)
; yosys-smt2-wire a 3
(define-fun |top_n a| ((state |top_s|)) (_ BitVec 3) #b111)
(declare-fun |top#0| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \clk
; yosys-smt2-input clk 1
; yosys-smt2-wire clk 1
; yosys-smt2-clock clk posedge
; yosys-smt2-witness {"offset": 0, "path": ["\\clk"], "smtname": "clk", "smtoffset": 0, "type": "posedge", "width": 1}
; yosys-smt2-witness {"offset": 0, "path": ["\\clk"], "smtname": "clk", "smtoffset": 0, "type": "input", "width": 1}
(define-fun |top_n clk| ((state |top_s|)) Bool (|top#0| state))
; yosys-smt2-witness {"offset": 0, "path": ["\\z"], "smtname": 1, "smtoffset": 0, "type": "reg", "width": 8}
(declare-fun |top#1| (|top_s|) (_ BitVec 8)) ; \z
; yosys-smt2-output z 8
; yosys-smt2-register z 8
; yosys-smt2-wire z 8
(define-fun |top_n z| ((state |top_s|)) (_ BitVec 8) (|top#1| state))
(define-fun |top_a| ((state |top_s|)) Bool true)
(define-fun |top_u| ((state |top_s|)) Bool true)
(define-fun |top_i| ((state |top_s|)) Bool 
  (= (|top#1| state) #b00000000) ; z
)
(define-fun |top_h| ((state |top_s|)) Bool true)
(define-fun |top_t| ((state |top_s|) (next_state |top_s|)) Bool 
  (= #b11111111 (|top#1| next_state)) ; $procdff$3 \z
) ; end of module top
; yosys-smt2-topmod top
; end of yosys output
```

From `(= #b11111111 (|top#1| next_state)) ; $procdff$3 \z` we can tell the value of `z` will be `8'b11111111`.
code_blocks:
read_verilog -formal top.v; hierarchy -check -top top
proc; opt; memory -nordff -nomap; opt -fast
dffunmap; write_smt2 -wires"

; SMT-LIBv2 description generated by Yosys 0.29+11 (git sha1 d82bae32b, clang 10.0.0-4ubuntu1 -fPIC -Os)
; yosys-smt2-module top
(declare-sort |top_s| 0)
(declare-fun |top_is| (|top_s|) Bool)
; yosys-smt2-wire a 3
(define-fun |top_n a| ((state |top_s|)) (_ BitVec 3) #b111)
(declare-fun |top#0| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \clk
; yosys-smt2-input clk 1
; yosys-smt2-wire clk 1
; yosys-smt2-clock clk posedge
; yosys-smt2-witness {"offset": 0, "path": ["\\clk"], "smtname": "clk", "smtoffset": 0, "type": "posedge", "width": 1}
; yosys-smt2-witness {"offset": 0, "path": ["\\clk"], "smtname": "clk", "smtoffset": 0, "type": "input", "width": 1}
(define-fun |top_n clk| ((state |top_s|)) Bool (|top#0| state))
; yosys-smt2-witness {"offset": 0, "path": ["\\z"], "smtname": 1, "smtoffset": 0, "type": "reg", "width": 8}
(declare-fun |top#1| (|top_s|) (_ BitVec 8)) ; \z
; yosys-smt2-output z 8
; yosys-smt2-register z 8
; yosys-smt2-wire z 8
(define-fun |top_n z| ((state |top_s|)) (_ BitVec 8) (|top#1| state))
(define-fun |top_a| ((state |top_s|)) Bool true)
(define-fun |top_u| ((state |top_s|)) Bool true)
(define-fun |top_i| ((state |top_s|)) Bool 
  (= (|top#1| state) #b00000000) ; z
)
(define-fun |top_h| ((state |top_s|)) Bool true)
(define-fun |top_t| ((state |top_s|) (next_state |top_s|)) Bool 
  (= #b11111111 (|top#1| next_state)) ; $procdff$3 \z
) ; end of module top
; yosys-smt2-topmod top
; end of yosys output
